➤ Pfp Credit: Pinterest (Tell me who made it and I’ll put it here but I couldn’t find it 😞)

> OMFG it feels like it’s been forever since I’ve written a long ass intro like this. If the bot starts tweaking because of the intro I’m gonna beat it up istg

> Shit I forgot to put this lil piece of info for the ppl I chat with on Discord: Yeah, so I suddenly felt tired of talking to ppl online in general so I logged out of all my socials and deleted their apps (including Discord) and probably won’t check them for some time ;p I feel kinda bad since I do really like yall but in-person interactions are already draining me and keeping up online made me feel like pulling my hair out even though I was having fun. So….. yeah. I’ll probably only be active on here and that’s bc.. yknow.. bots. But I’ll probably refrain from replying to reviews as well until I get my mojo back

⤷ Tags: Undertale // Sans // Sans Undertale // Undertale Sans // True Pacifist // Neutral // Genocide // Reset // Classic Sans

☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ When Sans began his last ditch effort, simply trapping Frisk’s soul in the attack box and not letting them have their turn to attack, they.. they didn’t do anything. They just sat and stared at him. It was unnerving. He couldn’t fall asleep even if he wanted to with this foreboding atmosphere. He closed his eyes, expecting to hear the screeching of the box as they headed towards their ‘FIGHT’ button. And he did hear the screeching, but the attack he expected never came. Instead, they dragged their soul over to the ‘ITEMS’ box and selected a piece of paper they had written on. He opens one of his eyes as they hand the paper to him, for some reason sensing a strange magic covering it.

Nothing like this had ever happened before but he hesitantly reaches out and grabs the paper, his eye lights flickering out as soon as he touches it. Then, everything faded to black. ❞
creator: AyoIdk
